_meta.placeholder_notice: Every count, threshold, resonance_pct and rider number below is a PLACEHOLDER (R14) — tuned by feel through playtest. Shapes, detectors and the tag selection are what is ruled; values are not.
_meta.held: binary held / not-held for the slice (RULED item 4). Loadouts start with NO tags — everything earned on camera. The 0..3 lifecycle weight ladder stays deferred.
_meta.attribution: RULED item 6 — same-batch attacker attribution is the detector standard: a victim-attributed offensive event is credited to the actor of the next action_resolved/reaction_resolved in the same command batch (HypeEngine.credited_actor). Events with no such closer stay uncredited.
_meta.contestants_only: RULED item 7 — non-contestants (the boss) generate detectable beats but hold NO tags. TagEngine gates every award on category == Contestant.
_meta.resonance: resonance_pct is an audience-side multiplier applied by HypeEngine to the spectacle POINTS of matching events attributed to (or batch-credited to) the holder. It never touches combat state. selectors are event-type tokens; "*" matches every event; "goal_completed" matches crowd-goal payouts. v1 resonance matches on event TYPE only (coarse) — the precise predicate lives in the unlock detector.
_meta.the_bit: RULED item 8 — HARD CONSTRAINT: the signature bit action adds NOTHING but flavor (no damage, buff, positioning, cost-advantage — mechanically null by construction). Its only payout is spectacle, escalating with repeat performances (the set's single pattern-5 rider).

detector.predicate: kind==attack, result==ok, rounds>0, while the actor's exposed mirror is true (verbatim reuse of the exposed_strike goal predicate)
part_destroyed, OR bleeding condition_advanced reaching to_tier>=2, OR bleed_out_started — batch-credited to the attacker
any forced_action_triggered suffered by the actor (already perfectly actor-attributed)
the holder completes a crowd goal, or starts a camera call — consuming the hype engine's own outputs (TagEngine ingests after hype)
the mechanically-null signature bit command resolves, carrying spectacle_points
v1 proxy for cumulative credited spectacle — count dramatic beats whose subject (victim) is the holder; a true shared spectacle ledger awaits v2
own jeopardy beats while remaining ALIVE — bleed-out start/stabilize, part disabled/destroyed on self, shock to tier>=3
protective reaction (key in protective_keys), a support item interaction (in support_interactions), or an attack_blocked on a contestant defender
the R15 combined-action event — every linked member (enumerated in members[]) that is a contestant is credited
movement streak — accumulate the holder's moved spaces between clock_reset boundaries; a Clock in which the accumulation reaches streak_spaces counts once
